daily_backup_limit.description: Number of daily backups to keep. Note that the minimum daily backup limit is 2.

weekly_backup_limit.description: Number of weekly backups to keep. Note that the sum of daily, weekly and monthly backups should be greater than 1.

monthly_backup_limit.description: Number of monthly backups to keep. Note that the sum of daily, weekly and monthly backups should be greater than 1.

location.description: Name of the region for the policy to apply to.

name.description: The name of the backup policy. Needs to be unique per location.

labels.description: Labels as key value pairs. Example: `{ "owner": "Bob", "department": "finance", "purpose": "testing" }`. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

description.description: An optional description of this resource.

enabled.description: If enabled, make backups automatically according to the schedules. This will be applied to all volumes that have this policy attached and enforced on volume level.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
